title: Can I set different non-working days on the Timeline view?
excerpt:
Henlo friends! 
Is there a way to set non-working days in my timelines and calendars for the whole team? For example, we don’t work on Fridays, so when I’m building out timelines or scheduling tasks, I would like Fridays…

posts.author: khori (Khori Walker-John)
posts.cookedHtml:
Henlo friends!
Is there a way to set non-working days in my timelines and calendars for the whole team? For example, we don’t work on Fridays, so when I’m building out timelines or scheduling tasks, I would like Fridays to be automatically excluded. Is that possible?

posts.author: charlottes (Charlotte Siverson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Khori,

Great question. I don’t have much details on your workflow but here is something you might want to consider: If you guys are taking your weekend on Friday and Saturday, you have the option to change the Admin Settings, as you can see below. You can also decide to hide weekends from your Timeline View (not Calendar!):

image1344×1006 98.3 KB

I hope it helps!

Best,
Charlotte

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
